summary: The video discusses the integration of the VIKTOR app with the Autodesk AEC Data Model API to optimize modern BIM workflows by enhancing efficiency, reducing costs, and minimizing coding complexities. It highlights the benefits of cloud-based data access and automated processes in digital engineering projects, with live demos showcasing functionalities like compliance checks, carbon footprint estimation, and schedule management on VIKTOR’s low-code platform.
